content:
name: Blooms/Botane — product titles and descriptions are supplier-provided
description: On blooms.nl (Botane brand), product titles (e.g. Rosewater, Stormy Sun) and likely product descriptions are supplied by the supplier. Do not translate or rewrite them.
type: feedback
---

On the Blooms/Botane Shopify store (blooms.nl), product titles like *Rosewater*, *Stormy Sun*, *Sorbet Kisses*, *Blossom Veil* are supplied by the supplier and must be kept as-is — do not recommend translating them to Dutc
- [user_workflow.md](user_workflow.md) - User frequently deploys Webflow exports to Netlify via GitHub

name: Webflow to Netlify workflow
description: User frequently deploys Webflow exports to Netlify via GitHub - prefers automated flow
type: user
---

User regularly exports websites from Webflow and deploys them as static sites on Netlify via GitHub. This is a repeated workflow. GitHub org is "four-online". Netlify account is "Fouronline" (info@fouronline.nl). User prefers Dutch communication.
- [Juo subscription integration](project_juo_integration.md) — Ongoing: integrate Juo selling plans into zakelijk-abonnement configurator. BloomMembership source must sync with deployed design first.
- [No rebuild without sync](feedback_no_rebuild_without_sync.md) — Never rebuild zakelijk-abonnement.js from BloomMembership without first syncing the source with the deployed version.

name: Never rebuild zakelijk-abonnement without syncing BloomMembership first
description: Rebuilding from BloomMembership source breaks the deployed design because the source is out of date. Always sync source with deployed version first.
type: feedback
---

NOOIT zakelijk-abonnement.js rebuilden vanuit de BloomMembership source zonder eerst te verifiëren dat de source 1:1 matcht met het deployed design.

**Why:** Meerdere keren is de widget kapot gegaan of het design veranderd door een rebuild

name: Juo subscription integration - zakelijk abonnement
description: Ongoing project to integrate Juo selling plans into the zakelijk-abonnement configurator. BloomMembership repo source must be synced with deployed design first.
type: project
---
De zakelijk-abonnement pagina heeft een React configurator (deployed JS/CSS) die niet vanuit de BloomMembership source gerebuild kan worden omdat de source achterloopt op het deployed design.

- **JS/CSS**: Originele deployed versie (design intact)
- **Liquid section**: Heeft een DOM overlay script dat frequentie labels, prijzen, en selling plan IDs injecteert via Storefront API
- **Probleem**: DOM overlay is fragiel — hardcoded content flasht, product filtering werkt niet betrouwbaar, React overschrijft DOM wijzigingen

De BloomMembership repo (`four-online/BloomMembership`, gecloned in `/tmp/BloomMembership`) moet gesynchroniseerd worden met het deployed design. De deployed JS staat in `assets/zakelijk-abonnement.js` (commit 4db4e6b is de laatst werkende versie zonder Juo patches, maar de huidige main heeft price:0 patches).

### Design elementen in deployed JS die NIET in BloomMembership source zitten:
1. `zak-mobile-heading` — mobile heading boven image
2. `zak-sticky-cta` — sticky CTA bar met prijs, kwartaa

- BloomMembership source is gesynchroniseerd met deployed design
- Juo integratie werkt: frequenties, producten, selling plans
- Cart drawer: stuurt `cart:change` event met sections data
- Batch prefetch: alle 3 collections in 1 API call bij pageload
- Prijsweergave: `displayPrice / getFrequencyMonths(label)` = maandprijs
- Kwartaalprijs: `maandprijs * 3 / 1.21` excl BTW

- Cart drawer popup opent mogelijk niet correct (sections data)
- Juo prijzen moeten in Juo zelf gecheckt worden (API geeft €49 voor Essential maandelijks, user verwacht €35)
- BloomMembership repo moet nog gecommit worden naar GitHub (changes zijn lokaal in /tmp/BloomMembership)

**Why:** De klant wil dat alle content (producten, frequenties, prijzen) dynamisch uit Juo komt, zonder hardcoded fallbacks of flash van oude content.

**How to apply:** Source is nu in sync. Toekomstige wijzigingen: e

name: Blooms product titles vs descriptions
description: Product titles are off-limits (Botane supplier names). Product descriptions (body_html) are fair game for Dutch SEO rewrites.
type: feedback
---

**Titles are off-limits.** Product titles like "Rosewater", "Heartbeat", "After Rain" are the names Botane (the supplier) gave the products. They stay as-is — never translate them, never rewrite them, never add suffixes in the Shopify title field (the SEO title suffix " | Botane Kunstbloemen | Bl
File unknown was edited 38 times this session — likely a hot path worth monitoring.
